summary_text: Concrete recommendation: add a **separate draft-only generator command** (do not reuse the existing auto-posting generator path directly) and keep it read-heavy + draft-write-only. **Safe integration point (new module + job entrypoint)** - Add a new command file: `[scripts/generate_draft_candidates.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/generate_draft_candidates.py)`. - Reuse existing utilities but call only draft-safe functions: - source history load from `[post_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_generator.py): load_posts_from_json()` (Notion-first queue read). - quoted-author seed material from `[trend_scanner.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/trend_scanner.py)` outputs (`quote_candidates.json` and related loader flow). - validation/normalization from `[scripts/prepare_post_bundle.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/prepare_post_bundle.py): prepare_post()`. **Write path (must stay draft-only)** - Use Notion create/update only through `[notion_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py): push_new_to_notion()` with explicit `status="draft"`. - Do not call status promotion paths in the generator (`approved`, `posting`, etc.). - Do not call any scheduling helpers from generation (no `_next_available_slots`). - If metadata needs consistency for later human review, set only draft-safe fields (title/content/links/tags), and leave `scheduled_for` unset. **Where NOT to integrate** - Do **not** integrate generation in the current approval lane of `[auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py)` without strict mode gating, because it currently contains auto-approve behavior (`AUTO_APPROVE_ENABLED`) and auto-scheduling logic in `_prepare_generated_posts()`. - Do **not** patch scheduler runtime path: - `[scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py)` posts only from `status=="approved"` in `_post_due_jobs()`, so draft-only rows will naturally be non-posted, but this path should remain untouched. **Recommended function-level changes/usage** - Add or add-call helper in new command: - `load_self_history_for_candidates()` (wrap `load_posts_from_json()` + filter for authored successful/final historical posts). - `load_quoted_author_candidates()` (read from `quote_candidates.json` generated by `trend_scanner.py`). - `build_draft_candidate_rows()` (compose candidate record with `status="draft"` only). - `push_draft_rows_to_notion(rows)` (iterate `push_new_to_notion`). - Optional: keep a tiny local append cache function for debug only, but do not affect scheduler order/schedule. **Process control / scheduling** - Add a dedicated launch job, similar shape to the existing launchd plists, e.g. `com.cursorvers.x-auto-draft-autogen.plist` in `[x-auto]` root, pointing to the new `scripts/generate_draft_candidates.py`. - This isolates risk: new rows are created from Notion-first + quote data, visible for manual review, never auto-approved and never auto-scheduled.
